01About

Strategy
meets Cinema

Dubai Licensed & Compliant
4K
Broadcast-Ready Output

I'm a Dubai-based videographer and photographer with over 10 years of corporate experience in marketing, sales, and client management across leading banking institutions in India.

My transition into visual storytelling was driven by a deep understanding of how businesses grow. I combine corporate strategy with creative execution to produce content that is not just visually compelling, but result-oriented and revenue-focused.

I don't just create videos — I create content assets that drive business growth.

Registered Freelance License · Open Road Films LLC
Every frame I create is designed to add value to your brand and leave a lasting impact.

02Services

What I Create

Every project is backed by strategic storytelling. Your brand doesn't just look good — it performs.

01

Corporate Films

Professional storytelling reflecting your company's vision, culture, and values.

02

Brand & Promo Videos

High-impact visuals to boost brand awareness and attract customers.

03

Event Coverage

Cinematic capture of corporate events, launches, and conferences.

04

Explainer Videos

Clear, engaging content to simplify complex ideas and enhance communication.

—Specialized Solutions

Brand Films / Commercials

Short, high-end 30–60 sec polished videos crafted for luxury and premium brands.

Corporate Testimonials

Professionally lit, high-quality audio interviews designed to build trust and credibility.

Product Launch Videos

Dynamic visuals with close-ups and slow-motion, highlighting textures and premium branding.

03Process

How It Works

01

Pre-Production

The foundation of quality. Structured planning for clarity, efficiency, and alignment with your business goals.

Concept Scripting Storyboard Location Scout
02

Production

Cinematic execution. High-end professional cameras, controlled lighting, and purpose-driven direction on location.

Direction 4K Cameras Pro Lighting Audio
03

Post-Production

Where the story comes together. Personally handled end-to-end for creative consistency and premium finish.

Editing Color Grade Motion GFX Sound Design
04

Final Delivery

Broadcast-ready content delivered in all required formats, optimized for web, social, and screen.

Final Cut Pro DaVinci Resolve Multi-format

04Why Me

The Difference

01

Corporate DNA

10+ years in banking and corporate sales means I understand ROI, client psychology, and market positioning — not just cameras.

02

Strategy-First

Every project begins with business goals. I identify your target audience and craft a story that doesn't just look good — it sells.

03

Fully Licensed

Registered freelance license in Dubai, backed by Open Road Films LLC. Every project runs legally, professionally, and without interruption.

04

End-to-End

From concept to final delivery, everything is personally handled. No handoffs, no disconnected teams — complete creative control.

05

Global Perspective

All-India motorcycle expeditions and cross-European journeys bring cultural awareness and authentic storytelling to every project.

06

Dubai & Beyond

Based in Dubai, available for regional and international projects. Deep knowledge of local filming regulations and permits.

06Beyond the Lens

Adventure Fuels
the Work

Alongside professional work, I'm a passionate traveler and adventure seeker. Having completed All-India motorcycle expeditions and explored Europe, I bring a global perspective, adaptability, and authenticity into every project.

Travel has strengthened my ability to adapt to any environment, capture real unscripted moments, and tell stories that connect across cultures.
